panels.description: Total write rate (measure + stream + trace).

targets.expr: (sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_written{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_written{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_written{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))

panels.title: Cluster Write Rate

panels.description: gRPC query request rate.
panels.title: Cluster Query Rate

panels.description: gRPC + queue publish + write-queue sync errors per minute. Stays 0 (not No-Data) while healthy.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_registry_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_stream_msg_received_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_sync_loop_err{job=~"$job", container_name="liaison", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_sync_loop_err{job=~"$job", container_name="liaison", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_sync_loop_err{job=~"$job", container_name="liaison", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0))

panels.title: Error Rate

panels.description: gRPC query rate by service (measure / stream / property).
panels.title: Query Rate by Service

panels.description: Average query latency per group.

targets.expr: sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_latency{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", method="query", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group) / sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",method="query"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group)

panels.title: Query Latency by Group

panels.description: gRPC error rates (request errors, registry errors, stream receive errors).
panels.title: gRPC Error Rate

panels.description: Registry and non-query gRPC operation rate.
panels.title: Registry Operation Rate

panels.description: Write rate by group (measure / stream / trace).
panels.title: Write Rate by Group

panels.description: Liaison publish success rate by operation and file-sync byte throughput by group.
panels.title: Publish Throughput & Success

panels.description: Liaison write-ahead queue backlog: on-disk part folders + in-memory parts + pending items. >0 = data nodes slow/unreachable. (file_parts/mem_part appear only when the queue is non-empty; pending_data_count is the always-present anchor.)
panels.title: Write Queue Length (wqueue)

panels.description: p99 latency of publish sends from liaison to data nodes, by operation.
panels.title: Publish Send Latency p99

panels.description: Total file elements by group (measure / stream / trace).
panels.title: Total Data

panels.description: File merge loop rate (per minute) by group.
panels.title: Merge File Rate

panels.description: Average file merge latency by group.

targets.expr: sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_merge_latency{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", type="file", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group) / sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_merge_loop_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group)

sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_merge_latency{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", type="file", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group) / sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_merge_loop_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group)

sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_merge_latency{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", type="file", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group) / sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_merge_loop_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group)

panels.title: Merge File Latency

panels.description: Average partitions merged per file merge, by group.

targets.expr: sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_merged_parts{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", type="file", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group) / sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_merge_loop_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group)

sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_merged_parts{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", type="file", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group) / sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_merge_loop_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group)

sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_merged_parts{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", type="file", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group) / sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_merge_loop_started{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (group)

panels.title: Merge File Partitions

panels.description: Subscribe `query` RPCs per group: started / finished rate (left axis) and p99 handling latency (right axis).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", operation="query", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, group))

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(banyandb_queue_sub_total_latency_bucket{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod", operation="control", group=~"$group"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le, group))
